title: Ethereal: Skybound
description: Travel though the Skylands and become legend
body:
![Ethereal Skybound](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/614869e97314a15859931977310c8e8e6be82028.png)

Travle across the skies and become legend. 
Ethereal: Skybound is the first of a new modpack series. As the name suggests, this pack takes place within the sky. 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MuHy4mncc7w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Did I mention you get wings frame 1? This pack is aming for a fun, almost whymsical feel, and is less focused on dificulty and progresson. Explore the breathtaking vistas to your heart's content. (The Bliss shaders make it even better, Try Nvidium if you have an RTX GPU.)

Create plus a few addons, allow for interesting sky factories. 
Immersive Aircraft is included for when your wings get tired (or its raining...) 
Dont forget to take on the bosses from Bosses of Mass Destruction, with your new Mythic Metals gear!
Become a powerful Botania master, or presue the path of Scriptor Magicae
Or if your more old fashion, bring a big'ol sword from Simply Swords.
There is pleanty to discover.
Oh, and never forget your skills from Simply Skills.


(Psst, you can also enable Do a Barrle Roll with the [=/+] button.)


Future Additons:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Quests | VR (Maybe) | More Storage Options | More Tech | More Gear
</details>
